Video.summary: Demario and Necole’s relationship is tested when he tries to impose his conservative Christian values onto her.
Video.title: Scott vs. Thomas

Video.summary: Stacy claims her mom Sherry promised to support her in college. Sherry says she's jobless and can't afford her allowance.
Video.title: The Long Con

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for the sale of sick puppy. Then, a sister sues brother for his failure to pay for car.
Video.title: One Sick Puppy

Video.summary: First, daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle. Then, two sisters dispute car payments.
Video.title: Pain in the Cars

Video.summary: First, a dispute over the caring of horses. Then, plaintiff claims the defendant caused an accident.
Video.title: For the Love of Horses

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for parking ticket. Then, a litigant disputes a breach of contract over an investment.
Video.title: Unsullied and Unpaid

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims dog mauled his cat to death. Then, woman claims she got duped for a knock off.
Video.title: Knocked off

Video.summary: First, a friendship is strained over money. Then, the plaintiff wants her money back from friend.
Video.title: The Root of All Evil

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims friend destroyed her car. Then, plaintiff claims money stolen from child’s shoebox.
Video.title: Grand Theft Shoe Box

Video.summary: First, a woman claims defendent sold her a broken car. Then, a plaintiff claims unpaid lones.
Video.title: M'lady of Maladies

Video.summary: First, a man sues estranged friend for an unpaid loan. Then, couple is suing for an unfinished remodeling job.
Video.title: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Image.alt: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues her landlord for rent money. Then, man believes he was duped by a car seller.
Video.title: A Roach and a Lemon

Video.summary: First, a daughter refuses to pay her mother back. Then, the plaintiff claims that her ex took luxury purses.
Video.title: The Deadbeat Bag Snatcher

Video.summary: An aunt says she lent her nephew money to fix his car, but he insists he never borrowed any money; an auto mechanic says a woman failed to provide a deposit on repairs and used his garage to store and hide her vehicle from being repossessed.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: A woman alleges that the defendants knowingly rented her a home that was fraught with bed bugs; a marriage gone bad has an ex-wife suing her ex-husband for a multitude of expenses.
Video.title: Bugged Lease

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-fiance split without paying his share of the bills; an attempt to help a homeless single mom went awry when, the plaintiff claims, the defendant nearly burned down her kitchen.
Video.title: Charred Intentions

Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: Robert is suing his young fling Latasha after claiming she damaged his property.
Video.title: You Are 58 Trying to Date A 22-Year-Old!

Image.alt: You Are 58 Trying to Date A 22-Year-Old!
You Are 58 Trying to Date A 22-Year-Old!
You Are 58 Trying to Date A 22-Year-Old!

Video.summary: Davonte Collins says his mother, the defendant, illegally signed his name to a lease on an apartment she was living in and still owes rent. Now, he’s on the hook for late fees, back rent, and cleaning fees. Amryl James-Reid says she and her son shared the apartment and she’s outraged he’s taking her to court today. She believes she owes her ungrateful stubborn son nothing but a lesson on respect. He’s suing for $5,000 and she’s accused of souring her son.
Video.title: Souring Her Son

Video.summary: Tavares Brown sues David Thompson for $5,000, claiming false accusations of pulling a gun got him arrested and cost him money. Thompson countersues for $5,000, insisting Brown threatened him with a gun.
Video.title: You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!

Image.alt: You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!
You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!
You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!

Video.summary: Plaintiff Tien sues landlord Jeffrey for $2,450, claiming he broke his promise to refund her after she backed out of renting his house. Jeffrey insists he doesn’t owe more, saying he already refunded most of the money and was left covering costs.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Allison says her baby daddy rarely sees their child, and she is suing for the cost of ballet classes and bills
Video.title: Too Passionate for Parenting

Video.summary: The plaintiff, who took guardianship of the defendant's baby because she was born with meth in her system, sues the birth mother for breach of contract; the defendant counter-sues for unreturned property and says the plaintiff is vindictive.
Video.title: Guardianship Grudges

Video.summary: Anthony claims he saw explicit text messages between the defendant and her ex, so he sues for unpaid loans.
Video.title: Raunchy Texts and Explicit Agreements

Video.summary: A couple say they bought a trailer from their neighbor, but he never gave it to them; he says they called the police and made death threats against him, so he's counter-suing for harassment.
Video.title: Trailer Troubles

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.
Video.title: Calling Collect

Video.summary: Sherrita thinks her Aunt Crystal spends all her money on clothes so she's suing for car payments and repairs.
Video.title: Pay Up

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong
